HTML templates for creating, displaying, and updating blog posts in a Flask application.


## Files
- **[create.html](create.html.md)**: HTML template for creating a new blog post with fields for title and body.
- **[index.html](index.html.md)**: HTML template for displaying blog posts with options to create or edit posts if the user is logged in.
- **[update.html](update.html.md)**: HTML template for editing and deleting a blog post in a Flask application.
